_notes: Step 1 S1.4 seed — F1 (Ritual Unlock) + F2 (Tutor Chain Potency) + F3 (Extra Deck Material Pool) active. F4 dropped. Values inspection-seeded; no tuning. F1 max = 3*2+1 = 7, F2 max = 8 (capped), F3 max = 4 (capped, reached at ~15 opportunities). Combined structural max reaches globalCap=15 when F1=7 + F2=8, but F3 adds another layer — globalCap acts as the ceiling.
